title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings for downloading, running, and chatting with local LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, …) via a lightweight HTTP server.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, push, list, delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client (Node + browser) for Ollama; identical API surface to the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (themes, multi-user, RAG, code highlighting).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI for browsing, downloading, and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline autocomplete.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama featuring synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive (RxJava) APIs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-crew
summary: CrewAI plugin that lets autonomous agents use any Ollama model as their back-end LLM.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension for chatting with Ollama models inside a sidebar panel.

title: ollama-nvidia-trt
summary: Upstream PR adding experimental TensorRT-LLM backend for accelerated inference on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama models through admin-configurable chat endpoints with rate limits.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s HTTP API with GenServer-based process management for chats.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG template combining LangChain, Ollama embeddings, and Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager library + SwiftUI example app for chatting with Ollama on macOS.
